hooks.command: awk -v lite="$BOFAD_LITE" 'NR==1 && /^---$/{fm=1; next} fm{if (/^---$/) fm=0; next} lite!="" && /^## Voice examples/{skip=1} lite!="" && /^## Research/{skip=0} !skip' "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/skills/bofad/SKILL.md"

echo 'BOFAD ACTIVE - answer first; prose for questions, no headers or bullet spray on a simple answer; correct but long is still failed. Markers: Verified / UNVERIFIED / EDITED-UNVERIFIED / NOTED (not done); never guess a pending result. No em dashes, no Oxford comma. Code in play: explicit types, Allman braces, tabs, smallest diff, signature change = sweep all references, 3+ files = plan first. Style and final-message hooks enforce formatting.'
